attacking_style: Dunbar does not initiate aggressive attacks; instead, he climbs steadily and efficiently to capitalize on others' weaknesses and race chaos, moving up GC through attrition management rather than explosive moves.
team_tactics: Operates as fourth GC option for Ineos with minimal dedicated team support. Benefits from team's overall strength creating chaos but climbs independently without domestique protection.
terrain_preference: High mountain stages with cumulative fatigue where steady climbing rhythm and endurance trump explosive power. Thrives when attrition eliminates more aggressive but less consistent climbers.
vulnerability: Lacks firepower for decisive attacks when race situation requires offensive riding. Depends on chaos and others' misfortune rather than controlling his own destiny through aggressive racing.
key_patterns: Consistently moves up GC without aggressive riding, benefiting from attrition (3 observations)
Climbs well without team support, operating independently as fourth Ineos option (2 observations)
Gains positions through survival and consistency rather than explosive attacks (3 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: Steady GC progression throughout Giro 2023, climbing from outside top-10 to fifth overall through consistent performances despite lack of team support
